steps.t: Andur is supposed to be in the hills east of Western Khanâg. You should go there and look for him.
You have found Andur in the hills east of Western Khanâg, exactly where he is supposed to be. You should talk to Andur.
You have found Andur exactly where he is supposed to be, but the donkey is wounded. Andur is caring for the donkey and has asked you to collect the se…

You have found Andur exactly where he is supposed to be, tending to the wounded donkey. You collected the semi-precious stones for him, which he said …
